Merged BUILD-001/slugify.py — The module fulfills the ticket requirements, correctly handling case, whitespace, accents, punctuation, hyphen collapsing, and includes inline tests without evident bugs.

FAIL #1: The test suite is functionally broken: test_concurrent_auth guarantees an AssertionError (slices a 5-entry fixture to [:10] then asserts len==10, so it has never passed green); test_auth_network_timeout sabotages other tests via mid-suite 'docker compose stop'; test_webhook_replay never counts settl
[claude] Independently reviewing business-analyst's deliverable

FAIL #1: The cost analysis is fabricated and internally inconsistent: Stripe's estimated annual cost of $1.02M is roughly 4x the correct value (~$274k at 2.9%+$0.30 on 150k×$50), and the WTP table lists Adyen ($0.96M) as meeting the Low WTP tier (≤$0.95M), which is false. Quantitative data and references app
